title: Run phpunit validation - all tests must pass
acceptance_criteria: No undefined variables or missing class errors
Boxer→Pad rename verified: no remaining references to Grid\Boxer or Boxer::new()
All 222 files properly moved and autoloaded
deliverables: Verification that Boxer.php is fully renamed to Pad.php

notes.validation_checklist: Run: cd sugar-dash && composer dump-autoload && vendor/bin/phpunit --testdox 2>&1 | head -100
notes.grep_for_boxer: After validation, grep for any remaining 'Grid\\Boxer' or 'Boxer::new()' to confirm rename is complete
notes.fail_on_warning: The phpunit.xml has failOnWarning=true, so any undefined variable or similar will fail the build
